title: Update company email to insightresearchblr@gmail.com across all pages and sections

requirements.summary: Update the company email address to 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' everywhere it appears across the site, including the Contact page, Footer, Navigation (if shown), and any other component or metadata that displays contact details
acceptanceCriteria: The email 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' appears in the Footer component wherever contact details are shown.
The email 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com' appears on the Contact page in the contact info block.
No outdated or placeholder email address remains anywhere on the site.
The mailto link (if present) correctly points to insightresearchblr@gmail.com.

file_operations.description: Update the email address displayed in the Footer contact details section to 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com'. Ensure any mailto links are also updated to use this correct email address.

Update the email address displayed in the company contact info block on the Contact page to 'insightresearchblr@gmail.com'. Verify that any mailto links or email display elements use the correct domain (gmail.com, not gmal.com).
